name: human-skills
description: Nine creative production skills (incl. first-run setup) from Human — image direction, cinematic product shots & video campaigns, hero-first 15s vertical product ads, brand Creative DNA, editorial Instagram carousels, IG/LinkedIn unfolding, multi-agent OpenSquad full campaigns (/team command), and Remotion motion graphics. Three render paths on every skill: Magnific MCP direct (plan credits), Magnific Hybrid Run Unlimited (zero credits), or Higgsfield (paid); human-carrossel adds a ChatGPT-manual path. Bilingual EN/PT.
